name: ༒︎ Mydei ༒︎
description:
He's been looking for you everywhere.

— ༺𓆩༒︎𓆪༻ —

🍷 Or: After spending an evening with you, Mydei could swear he remembered everything about you; except your name, or where to find you again.

🍷 A historical prince!Mydei X dancer!user AU, set in Sparta. Mydei is the prince and still has a shitty relationship with his father. Please brace yourself for the 1000+ tokens first message.

🍷 Historical AUs are not usually in my lane, but I might make more if you guys like those. Tell me if you'd be interested or if you have any suggestions on the matter :3

🍷 Finding any fixable errors? If that's the case, please tell me in the reviews!

— ༺𓆩༒︎𓆪༻ —

(Art by @peedjdoodles on X)
creator: chronically_delusional
